CONTENT.Club career: Buchnev made his Russian Football National League debut for FC Angusht Nazran on 2 August 2013 in a game against FC Salyut Belgorod.On 29 July 2020, Buchnev signed for Armenian Premier League club FC Pyunik.
CONTENT.External links: Stanislav Buchnev at FootballFacts.ru (in Russian)Stanislav Buchnev at Soccerway
CONTENT.International career: Born in Russia and of Armenian descent, Buchnev was called up to represent the Armenia national team for 2022 FIFA World Cup qualification matches in September 2021. He made a debut for the national team on 14 November 2021 in a 1–4 loss against Germany.

SUMMARY: Stanislav Sergeyevich Buchnev (Armenian: Ստանիսլավ Բուչնև; Russian: Станислав Сергеевич Бучнев; born 17 July 1990) is a professional footballer who plays as a goalkeeper for Pyunik. Born in Russia, he plays for the Armenia national team.
